name: Kofi Mensah
summary: Senior agricultural project manager with over a decade of experience driving sustainable farming initiatives across West Africa.

experience.title: Director of Agricultural Programs
bullets: Scaled smallholder farmer outreach from 2,000 to 15,000 participants in 4 years.
Secured $4.5M in international grants for irrigation infrastructure.
Developed a mobile-based crop monitoring system used by regional field agents.

experience.title: Senior Project Manager
bullets: Led a cross-functional team of 20 to improve cocoa yield consistency.
Introduced organic fertilization techniques that increased output by 20%.

achievements: Keynote speaker at the African Green Revolution Forum 2021
West Africa Leader in Sustainability Award 2019
